caption: A tan and white Corgi lies on a light-colored carpet in front of a dark blue couch with black metal legs. The dog is chewing on a long, tan-colored treat or chew toy. In the initial moments, the Corgi has the treat gripped firmly in its mouth, tilting its head slightly downward with its eyes narrowed. As the sequence progresses, the dog adjusts its grip on the treat, opening its mouth wider to shift the object. The Corgi’s gaze shifts, looking more directly forward with wider eyes by the end of the clip. Its paws are tucked slightly under its chest on the carpet. There are no people, text, or logos visible in the scene; the focus remains entirely on the dog interacting with its treat in a domestic interior setting.
